title: Agent prompt hardening — Docker is off-limits rule

steps.description: Create docs/IW_AI_Core_Agent_Constraints.md. Add the `⛔ Docker is off-limits` section to every file in ai-dev/templates/ (11 files). Embed the rule in .claude/skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md. Keep skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md in sync if it exists.
Code review: S01 (rule text verbatim in all 11 templates, policy doc structured for extension, iw-workflow SKILL.md system-instruction update correct, skills/ master copy synced).
Add the Critical Rules bullet to all 5 CLAUDE.md files (root, orch/, dashboard/, executor/, tests/). Cross-reference from docs/IW_AI_Core_DB_Setup.md. Audit for stale contradictions.
Code review: S03 (bullet style matches existing Critical Rules entries, link to policy doc resolves, no contradicting rules remain).
tests/integration/test_agent_constraints_coverage.py — asserts the marker phrase appears in every file of the enforcement set. Includes a mutation-test run documented in the report.
Code review: S05 (enforcement set is complete, marker phrase check is strict/exact, mutation test properly performed and restored, test is read-only and deterministic).

Final cross-layer review: rule text identical across all touch-points; grep test passes and correctly fails under mutation; CR-00014 + CR-00015 still green; sibling-repo propagation list captured in report for manual sync.
